_notes.continuous: 14 features (excludes target CKHL_SM). DT and PEF have missing values (36.47% and 15.59%).
_notes.binary_common: Present in all 4 variants. CT/RT/SWT_missing: per-sample sentinel cleanup flags. MSFL/DT/PEF_missing_source: source-level curve absence.
_notes.binary_with_outlier_only: Only present in with_outlier variants. All _missing columns were dropped (all zeros).
_notes.dropped_columns: All _missing columns and most _missing_source columns were dropped as they had all zeros.
_notes.categorical_values: Explicit category lists for OneHotEncoder. Source: 7 wells (A-G). Zone: 11 zones (0-10) from zonation_ranges_depths.csv.
